channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: Loblaw confirms data breach - Canadian retail giant says 'basic customer information' affected
item.description:
Loblaw confirms cyberattack exposing customer contact data
Names, phone numbers, and emails stolen, but no passwords or financial info
Stolen details could fuel phishing attacks despite being “basic” data
Loblaw has suffered a cyberattack in which crooks stole customers’ basic contact information. “Loblaw notified customers today that it is investigating a data breach,” it said. “After identifying suspicious activity on a contained, non-critical part of its IT network, the company has dete...
